title: encelia grandiflora
intro: Encelia grandiflora, also known as the tree encelia or brittlebush, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Encelia grandiflora include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Encelia grandiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to address a range of health issues.
